html_lang_valid.0: The default human language of the page must be valid and specified in accordance with BCP 47
html_lang_valid.Fail_1: Specified 'lang' attribute does not include a valid primary language

html_lang_exists.0: Page must identify the default language of the document with a 'lang' attribute
html_lang_exists.Fail_3: Page detected as HTML, but does not have a 'lang' attribute

skip_main_exists.0: Pages must provide a way to skip directly to the main content
skip_main_exists.Fail_1: The page does not provide a way to quickly navigate to the main content (ARIA "main" landmark or a skip link)

text_quoted_correctly.0: Quotations should be marked with <q> or <blockquote> elements
text_quoted_correctly.Potential_1: If the following text is a quotation, mark it as a <q> or <blockquote> element: {0}

element_tabbable_unobscured.0: When an element receives focus, it is not entirely covered by other content
element_tabbable_unobscured.potential_obscured: Confirm that when the element receives focus, it is not covered or, if covered by user action, can be uncovered without moving focus

element_tabbable_visible.0: A tabbable element should be visible on the screen when it has keyboard focus
element_tabbable_visible.potential_visible: Confirm the element should be tabbable and if so, it becomes visible when it has keyboard focus

style_color_misuse.0: Combine color and descriptive markup to convey information
style_color_misuse.Potential_1: Verify color is not used as the only visual means of conveying information

a_text_purpose.0: Hyperlinks must have an accessible name for their purpose
a_text_purpose.fail_acc_name: Hyperlink has no link text, label or image with a text alternative

img_alt_valid.0: Images must have accessible names unless they are decorative or redundant
img_alt_valid.fail_no_alt: The image has neither an accessible name nor is marked as decorative or redundant

text_contrast_sufficient.0: The contrast ratio of text with its background must meet WCAG AA requirements
text_contrast_sufficient.fail_contrast: Text contrast of {0} with its background is less than the WCAG AA minimum requirements for text of size {1}px and weight of {2}

img_alt_redundant.0: The text alternative for an image within a link should not repeat the link text or adjacent link text
img_alt_redundant.Fail_1: Link text is repeated in an image 'alt' value within the same link

text_block_heading.0: Heading text should use a heading element or role
text_block_heading.potential_heading: Confirm this text '{0}' is used as a heading and if so, modify to use a heading element or role

heading_markup_misuse.0: Heading elements must not be used for presentation
heading_markup_misuse.Potential_1: Verify that the heading element is a genuine heading

table_headers_related.0: For a complex data table, all <th> and <td> elements must be related via 'header' or 'scope' attributes
table_headers_related.Fail_1: Complex table does not have headers for each cell properly defined with 'header' or 'scope'

object_text_exists.0: <object> element must have a text alternative for the content rendered by the object
object_text_exists.fail_no_text_alternative: An <object> element does not have a text alternative
